task.inventory_reason: Cluster aliases point to one reusable GitHub source family plus several dataset-level downloads. The checked repository is an explicit curated collection of publicly available original-replication datasets and cleaned data/code artifacts; the local EMDR, lie-language, cleanliness-moral, and mindbody self-centrality hits are child artifacts, not separate root source families.
task.next_action: Inventory these files under the existing GitHub source-family row; attach cleaned CSVs, processing scripts, download metadata, and repository manifests as child artifacts, without creating separate root rows for each pair dataset.
